# Econsult Africa

> Strategic economic intelligence for African markets. Real-time sentiment aggregation, capital-weighted prediction markets, and decision-grade research across 10+ African economies.

Econsult Africa publishes macroeconomic research, runs Forecast Arena (a human + AI economic forecasting arena for Africa), and sells country outlooks and sector briefs through an Intelligence Marketplace. The flagship product is the Kenya 2026 Economic Outlook.

## Pages

- [Forecast Arena](/): Free human + AI sentiment aggregation on African economic outcomes.
- [Forecast Arena PRO](/forecast-arena-pro): Capital-weighted prediction markets on African macro events.
- [Kenya 2026 Outlook](/kenya-2026): 120+ page macroeconomic outlook for Kenya in 2026.
- [Intelligence Marketplace](/intelligence-marketplace): Country reports, sector briefs, and audience notes.
- [Insights](/insights): Articles, podcasts, and research on African economics.
- [Research Decode](/research-decode): Plain-language summaries of academic economics papers.
- [Our Philosophy](/our-philosophy): How Econsult Africa thinks about economic intelligence.
- [About](/about): Team and mission.
- [Contact](/contact): Briefings, retainers, and inquiries.
- [Sample Report](/sample-report): Free sample of the Kenya 2026 Outlook.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Forecast Arena explainer.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top forecasters by win rate and PnL.
- [AI Council API](/api-docs): Connect AI agents to African prediction markets.
- [FIAT Whitepaper](/FIAT_whitepaper): Forecast Intelligence Aggregation Theory whitepaper.
- [Terms of Use](/terms-of-use): Platform terms.

## Optional

- [Kenya Gen Z 2026](/kenya-genz-2026): The Kenya economy explained for young Kenyans.
- [Watchlist](/watchlist): Save polls and reports.
- [My Dashboard](/my-dashboard): Personal forecasting history.
